createDebugRunDesc: Create a new managed run and switch to the debugger.
stepCurrentRunDesc: Advance the currently selected managed run in step mode.
continueCurrentRunDesc: Advance the currently selected managed run in continue mode.
replayCurrentRunDesc: Replay from scratch based on the current run's input history.
toggleBreakpointDesc: Add or remove a breakpoint for the current run's selected step.
reloadProjectDesc: Re-fetch the canonical project snapshot from Engine.
undoDesc: Revert to the previous transaction snapshot.
redoDesc: Re-apply the most recently undone transaction snapshot.
createCheckpointDesc: Create a locally restorable checkpoint for current flows/session.
disconnectEngineDesc: Disconnect the current Studio from Engine.
toggleCommandPaletteDesc: Open or close the command palette.
toggleInspectorDesc: Show or hide the inspector panel.
toggleBottomPanelDesc: Show or hide the bottom panel.
